figures.caption: Fig. 3: Comparative performance of evaluated planners across different domains in terms of median solution cost and success rate over time, with 95% confidence interval in each plot. Note that the median solution cost is ∞ when the success rate of a planner is below 50%. The dots in each plot denote median initial solution times and costs with 95% confidence intervals (CI), while shadows around the dots indicate a more conservative 99% CI.
